zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret of Gloucester於1123年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford42歲，母親Sybil de Neufmarché23歲。她於1138年與Humphrey II de Bohun在英國賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年4月6日在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利享年74歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret of Gloucester was born in 1123, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, was 42 and her mother, Sybil de Neufmarché, was 23. She married Humphrey II de Bohun in 1138, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 April 1197, in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret of Gloucester est née en 1123, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Neufmarché, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey II de Bohun en 1138, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1197, à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret of Gloucesterが1123年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Herefordは42歳，母Sybil de Neufmarchéは23歳であった。1138年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでHumphrey II de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年4月6日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーで74歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret of Gloucester(이)가 1123년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Neufmarché(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1138년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Humphrey II de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 4월 6일 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

ru.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret of Gloucester родилась в 1123 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Neufmarché, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey II de Bohun в 1138 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 апреля 1197 г. в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Humphrey II de Bohun en 1138, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
